headline: All You Need to Know About Monster Beverage (MNST) Rating Upgrade to Buy
summary: Monster Beverage (MNST) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

headline: Is Pepsi Stock Hiding A Deeper U.S. Problem?

headline: Wall Street's Newest Blockbuster Stock Split Was Just Announced -- and This Non-Tech Titan Has Skyrocketed 457,000% Since Its IPO
summary: This consumer-facing company has increased its net sales annually for more than three decades.
